inputs.label: Room Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Surrounding ambient temperature affecting heat loss

inputs.businessContext: Time allowed for initial heating or temperature recovery

businessContext_i18n.en: Time allowed for initial heating or temperature recovery
businessContext_i18n.tr: İlk ısıtma veya sıcaklık geri kazanımı için izin verilen süre

inputs.label: System Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Overall efficiency accounting for heat loss through glass and evaporation

businessContext_i18n.en: Overall efficiency accounting for heat loss through glass and evaporation

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional capacity to ensure stable temperature under varying conditions

businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliche Kapazität zur Gewährleistung stabiler Temperaturen unter wechselnden Bedingungen

businessContext_i18n.es: Capacidad adicional para asegurar una temperatura estable bajo condiciones variables
